actor_claims.quote_text: Company directors and executive officers may be deemed to have interests in the merger that are different from, or in addition to, the interests of the Company’s shareholders generally and which may create potential conflicts of interest

actor_relation_claims.quote_text: our financial advisor, BMO Capital Markets Corp., which we refer to as “BMO,” rendered to the Board its oral opinion

The Robert H. Eder Trust and the Linda Eder Trust, which we refer to as the “Eder Trusts,” have executed a voting agreement with G&W and the Company under which the Eder Trusts have agreed to vote their shares in favor of approving the merger agreement.
actor_relation_claims.role_detail: voting agreement to vote shares in favor of approving the merger agreement

event_claims.description: The Board was aware of and considered potential conflicts of interests of Company directors and executive officers in approving and recommending the merger agreement.
event_claims.quote_text: The members of the Board were aware of and considered these interests in reaching the determination to approve the merger agreement and deem the merger agreement, the merger and the other transactions contemplated by the merger agreement to be advisable and in the best interests of the Company, and in recommending that the Company’s shareholders vote for the approval of the merger agreement.

event_claims.description: BMO rendered an oral fairness opinion to the Board at the Board meeting on August 12, 2016, later confirmed in writing.
event_claims.quote_text: In connection with the merger, at the meeting of the Board on August 12, 2016, our financial advisor, BMO Capital Markets Corp., which we refer to as “BMO,” rendered to the Board its oral opinion, subsequently confirmed by delivery of a written opinion dated August 12, 2016

event_claims.description: Company directors and executive officers may have interests in the merger different from or in addition to shareholders generally, creating potential conflicts of interest.
event_claims.quote_text: Company directors and executive officers may be deemed to have interests in the merger that are different from, or in addition to, the interests of the Company’s shareholders generally and which may create potential conflicts of interest

event_claims.actor_label: G&W, Merger Sub and the Company
event_claims.description: G&W, Merger Sub and the Company entered into the merger agreement on August 12, 2016.
event_claims.quote_text: G&W, Merger Sub and the Company entered into the merger agreement on August 12, 2016.
